message:
fix: update-version.js now updates latest branch when --set-latest is used

Previously --set-latest only updated the label and currentVersion.
Now it also updates the branch for the 'latest' entry to point to
the frozen version branch instead of 'main'.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
